label: DSG Website
useWhen: Use for public-facing reference, brand context, and external links.

label: DSG Share Folder
useWhen: Use as the main shared storage location for team files and final deliverables.

label: Zeffy
useWhen: Use for registrant lists, campaigns, workshop communication, and donation-related records.

label: DSG GPT
useWhen: Use to draft DSG-branded email copy, HTML blocks, brief language, prompts, and review checklists.

label: Canva
useWhen: Use for final designed assets, graphics, and branded visual templates.

label: Buffer Schedule
useWhen: Use for social scheduling after copy and assets are reviewed.

label: Manychat Automations
useWhen: Use for Messenger or automation review when a workflow touches chatbot messaging.

label: Meta Business Suite
useWhen: Use for Facebook or Instagram business account management and post review.

label: Relay
useWhen: Use for banking, receipts, payments, and finance cleanup tasks.

label: NY Charities Registration
useWhen: Use for New York charities registration filing and compliance reference.

label: IRS Charities and Nonprofits
useWhen: Use for federal nonprofit compliance reference.

label: IRS StayExempt
useWhen: Use for nonprofit compliance learning and board/admin education.

label: Awesome Foundation Submission
useWhen: Use when staging or submitting a lightweight funding idea.

label: New York Community Trust
useWhen: Use for funding fit research and grant readiness.

label: NYSCA Start Here
useWhen: Use for New York arts funding orientation and eligibility review.
